name: Rensselaer Polytechnic Institute
meets_full_need_notes: RPI does not guarantee to meet full demonstrated financial need. Average need met is approximately 65-70%. Aid packages combine institutional grants, loans, and work-study.
no_loan_notes: Loans are a standard component of RPI financial aid packages. No institutional no-loan policy.

merit_thresholds.notes: RPI offers significant merit scholarships including the Rensselaer Medal (for top high school students, ~$60,000 over 4 years), Dean's Scholarships, and departmental awards. The Rensselaer Medal is awarded through schools; winners who are admitted receive a scholarship.

ed_aid_implications: ED applicants receive merit and need-based aid on the same basis as other applicants. ED is binding, so comparing aid packages from multiple schools is not possible.
appeal_policy: Students may appeal their financial aid award by contacting the Office of Financial Aid. Appeals should include documentation of changed financial circumstances or special situations not reflected in initial application.
